chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1170 of 2022 Const. Petition No.D-1327 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.4850/2022 3. For hearing of CMA No.4389/2022 4. For hearing of main case 09-08-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for Petitioners in CP No.D-1170/2022 Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, Advocate for Petitioners in CP No. D-1327/2022 and for intervener in CP No.D-1170/2022 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for Respondent No.10 in CP No.D-1170/2022 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General, a/w Muhammad Adeel Soomro Assistant Commissioner Sukkur, Hajan Ujjan Addl. Commissioner-II, Sukkur and Majid Hameed ADC-II Ghotki.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners at the very outset submits that similar issue has already been decided by this Court by the order dated 02.06.2023 passed in several Petitions viz. CP No.D-1064, 1068, 1069 of 2022 and others and he would be satisfied if these petitions are disposed of in the light of same directions. The counsel appearing for other side including AAG, who have filed comments on behalf of Respondents No.3, 15, 16, and 4, 9 to 14, and submitted a copy of judgment have recorded no objection. Accordingly these petitions are disposed of in the light of observations made by Divisional Bench of this Court in aforesaid petitions. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
